name: Seated Hip Abduction Machine
lead: Exercise for hip abductors and glute muscles

instructions.starting position: Sit down onto the machine with your knees inside and up against the pads. Pull the pin to release the pads. Grasp the handles at the sides.
instructions.execution: Push out against the pads with your knees. When your hips are fully abducted, pause and then return to the starting position.
